description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, glossy black touchscreen display with minimal bezels, showing a digital clock, date, and the Hadoro Paris logo over a starry background. The back is covered in a textured green material, likely leather or faux leather, with a metallic 'H' logo and a prominent triple camera array in the top left corner. The sides are metallic gold with visible buttons for volume and power, adding a luxurious accent to the device. The phone appears slim and well-crafted, with a premium finish and attention to detail. Its design suggests it is intended for high-end urban use, blending style and advanced technology.
description: A premium smartphone with a glossy black display, green textured back, gold metallic sides, and a triple camera array. The device features luxury branding and a slim, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large black touchscreen with the Hadoro Paris logo, digital clock, and minimal bezels.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim profile, green and gold metallic edge, and a single elongated button.
description_view_2: Back view displays the green textured surface, metallic 'H' logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the gold metallic edge with two distinct buttons, likely for volume and power.
attribute_brand_logo: A metallic 'H' logo is centered on the upper back of the device, just below the camera array, and the Hadoro Paris logo is displayed on the front screen.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock (9:41), the date (Wednesday, September 12), a lock icon, battery and signal indicators, and the Hadoro Paris logo over a starry black background.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern with an additional flash module.
attribute_button_layout: There are two buttons on the right edge (likely power and volume up/down) and one elongated button on the left edge (possibly a mute or additional volume control).
attribute_case_or_cover_design: The phone is fitted with a green textured case or back cover, likely leather or faux leather, with a snug fit and a premium finish.
